final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the Changan Origin Q06 vehicle launch announcement.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation design, modern automotive marketing aesthetic, premium brand feel
Subject: automotive launch announcement for "长安起源Q06" with launch date "9月上市" as hero text, sleek vehicle silhouette or abstract automotive form
Composition: centered title hierarchy with ample breathing room, landscape orientation optimized for presentation slide format
Scene/backdrop: ethereal gradient background with light rays and atmospheric depth, translucent layered elements suggesting motion and innovation
Lighting/mood: soft volumetric lighting with subtle lens flare, aspirational and forward-looking mood
Color palette: deep navy or midnight blue as base, electric blue or silver accents, clean white for typography
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must function as PowerPoint cover slide; text must remain fully legible at thumbnail size; background must not overpower headline
Avoid: cluttered layout, stock photo clichés, excessive gradients, unreadable thin fonts, generic car silhouettes
